present simple.title: Present Simple
present simple.usage: Untuk kebiasaan, fakta umum, dan rutinitas.

present continuous.title: Present Continuous
present continuous.usage: Untuk kegiatan yang sedang berlangsung sekarang.
examples: I am reading an article now.
They are studying in the library.

simple past.title: Simple Past
simple past.usage: Untuk kejadian yang sudah selesai di masa lalu.
examples: She watched a movie last night.

simple future.title: Simple Future
simple future.usage: Untuk rencana, prediksi, atau keputusan spontan.

present perfect.title: Present Perfect
present perfect.usage: Untuk pengalaman atau aksi yang relevan sampai sekarang.

there is / there are.title: There is / There are
there is / there are.pattern: There is + singular / There are + plural
examples: There is a book on the table.

comparative.title: Comparative
examples: This book is cheaper than that one.
English is more interesting than math.

superlative.title: Superlative
superlative.usage: Untuk menyatakan yang paling dalam kelompok.
examples: She is the smartest in the class.
This is the most beautiful place.
